title: End Stone
body:
# End Stone
![End Stone mod showcase](https://imgur.com/VKo2lmu.png)
Minecraft mod that adds End Stone. Vanilla's End Stone is renamed "Cobbled End Stone" to avoid confusion.

End Stone is made by smelting End Cobblestone in a furnace and is found in the End.


### NEW IN 1.1.0:

This mod's End Stone now generates in the End. This does not affect gameplay much, as End Stone drops Vanilla's Cobbled End Stone when mined (unless with silk touch, just like how regular stone drops cobblestone).
